title: RF elements STA-SMA StarterAdapter SMA, 2x RSMA female connector
description: StarterAdapter SMA is a reducer for StarterDish antennas from RF Elements. This reduction is basically part of the wave transmitter with output to 2Ã RSMA female connectors with Vertical and Horizontal polarization. This allows you to connect any RF Element unit from different manufacturers using coaxial cables, namely MikroTik, Ubiquiti, Cambium, Mimosa and others
